merge_order_rationale: Foundation-first: services (#17) establishes data layer, shell (#18) establishes structure + tokens, EventLog (#13) registers in new shell, CSS (#15) applies tokens, hooks migration (#19) adapts to everything. Each merge depends on previous completing.

tasks.subject: Merge PR #17: services/dataFeed API (rebase + resolve conflicts)
tasks.description:
REQUEST_ID: merge-all-open-prs
DOMAIN: services
FILES: dist/, .claude/launchers/, docs/specs/time-sale.md, src/services/ (dataFeed.js, kalshiApi.js, etc)
VALIDATION: tier3
TIER: 3
PR: #17
BRANCH: agent-1

This PR completes the dataFeed.js portfolio/order API + hook wiring in the services layer.

STEPS:
1. git fetch origin
2. git checkout agent-1
3. git rebase origin/main (resolve any conflicts)
   - dist/ conflicts: accept theirs (main's version), we'll rebuild
   - .claude/ launcher conflicts: accept theirs (main has latest launcher format)
   - Source file conflicts: carefully merge, preserving PR's new API additions
4. npm run build — verify build passes
5. git push --force-with-lease origin agent-1
6. gh pr merge 17 --merge
7. Verify merge succeeded: gh pr view 17 --json state

LIKELY CONFLICTS:
- dist/ files (trivial — regenerated by build)
- .claude/launchers/ (accept main's version)
- package-lock.json (regenerate with npm install)

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- PR #17 shows state=MERGED on GitHub
- Build passes after merge
- Main branch updated with services changes

tasks.subject: Merge PR #18: shell/WindowManager cleanup + design system (rebase + resolve conflicts)
tasks.description:
REQUEST_ID: merge-all-open-prs
DOMAIN: shell
FILES: src/components/Shell.jsx, src/components/WindowManager.jsx, src/components/SettingsPanel.jsx, src/components/SettingsPanel.css, src/components/MenuBar.css, src/components/MarketViewer.css, src/components/Window.css, src/components/PopoutWindow.jsx, src/components/scanners/*.css, src/index.css, src/services/mockData.js
VALIDATION: tier3
TIER: 3
PR: #18
BRANCH: agent-5-clean

This PR does WindowManager cleanup and a design system overhaul with WCAG AA tokens. It establishes CSS custom properties used by other domains.

PREREQUISITE: PR #17 must be merged first (main updated with services changes).

STEPS:
1. git fetch origin
2. git checkout agent-5-clean
3. git rebase origin/main (resolve conflicts)
   - dist/ conflicts: accept main's, rebuild after
   - Shell.jsx/WindowManager.jsx: carefully merge — preserve #18's cleanup while keeping any new window types added by recently merged PRs (#11 TimeSale, #14 PriceLadder)
   - Scanner CSS: preserve #18's design token changes
   - mockData.js: merge carefully, keep both changes
4. npm run build — verify build passes
5. git push --force-with-lease origin agent-5-clean
6. gh pr merge 18 --merge
7. Verify: gh pr view 18 --json state

CRITICAL: Shell.jsx and WindowManager.jsx are coupling hotspots. PR #11 added TimeSale and PR #14 added PriceLadder — make sure these window type registrations survive the rebase. Check that WINDOW_TYPES in WindowManager.jsx includes: Chart, TimeSale, Montage, PriceLadder, Positions, TradeLog, LiveScanner, HistoricalScanner, MarketClock, Accounts.

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- PR #18 shows state=MERGED
- Build passes
- All existing window types still registered in WindowManager.jsx

tasks.subject: Merge PR #13: trade/EventLog component (rebase + resolve conflicts)
tasks.description:
REQUEST_ID: merge-all-open-prs
DOMAIN: trade
FILES: src/components/trade/EventLog.jsx, src/components/trade/EventLog.css, src/components/trade/EventLogSettings.jsx, src/components/trade/Montage.jsx, src/components/trade/Montage.css, src/components/trade/MontageSettings.jsx, src/components/Shell.jsx, src/components/WindowManager.jsx
VALIDATION: tier3
TIER: 3
PR: #13
BRANCH: agent-8

This PR adds the Event Log component with settings panel. It also registers EventLog as a new window type in Shell/WindowManager.

PREREQUISITE: PR #18 must be merged first (Shell/WindowManager are updated).

STEPS:
1. git fetch origin
2. git checkout agent-8
3. git rebase origin/main (resolve conflicts)
   - Shell.jsx: PR #18 restructured this. Add EventLog's window type to the UPDATED structure. Don't revert #18's changes.
   - WindowManager.jsx: Add EventLog import and type mapping to #18's updated format
   - Montage files: merge carefully, these may have CSS token changes from #18
   - .claude/scripts/: accept main's versions
4. npm run build — verify build passes
5. git push --force-with-lease origin agent-8
6. gh pr merge 13 --merge
7. Verify: gh pr view 13 --json state

CRITICAL: The EventLog registration in Shell.jsx and WindowManager.jsx is the most important part. After rebase, verify that:
- EventLog is importable and registered as a window type
- All OTHER window types from previous merges are still present
- Montage changes don't break existing Montage functionality

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- PR #13 shows state=MERGED
- Build passes
- EventLog registered in WindowManager.jsx
- All window types intact

tasks.subject: Merge PR #15: CSS WCAG AA compliance (rebase + resolve conflicts)
tasks.description:
REQUEST_ID: merge-all-open-prs
DOMAIN: integration
FILES: src/components/MarketViewer.jsx, src/components/quotes/Chart.jsx, src/components/quotes/TimeSale.jsx, src/components/scanners/HistoricalScanner.jsx, src/components/scanners/LiveScanner.jsx, src/components/trade/EventLog.css, src/components/trade/Montage.css, src/components/trade/Positions.css, src/components/trade/TradeLog.css, src/index.css, src/services/dataFeed.js
VALIDATION: tier3
TIER: 3
PR: #15
BRANCH: agent-6

This PR adds WCAG AA contrast compliance and design token consistency across the entire app.

PREREQUISITE: PRs #17, #18, #13 must all be merged first.

STEPS:
1. git fetch origin
2. git checkout agent-6
3. git rebase origin/main (resolve conflicts)
   - CSS files: #18 introduced design tokens. #15 may define similar tokens. Merge carefully — keep #18's token names as the canonical ones, apply #15's WCAG-compliant VALUES to those tokens.
   - src/index.css: both #15 and #18 modify root CSS variables. Combine: keep all unique variables, use #15's contrast-compliant color values.
   - Component JSX files: #15 adds className changes for accessibility. Preserve these while keeping the component structure from main.
   - dataFeed.js: #15 may have minimal changes here — accept main's version if #17's changes are more substantial.
   - dist/ files: accept main's, rebuild after.
4. npm run build — verify build passes
5. git push --force-with-lease origin agent-6
6. gh pr merge 15 --merge
7. Verify: gh pr view 15 --json state

IMPORTANT: This PR's value is in the CSS contrast values and accessibility improvements. The design token NAMES should match what #18 established. The WCAG AA contrast VALUES from this PR should be preserved.

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- PR #15 shows state=MERGED
- Build passes
- CSS variables use WCAG AA compliant contrast ratios
- No styling regressions visible

tasks.subject: Merge PR #19: trade hooks migration (rebase + resolve conflicts — COMPLEX)
tasks.description:
REQUEST_ID: merge-all-open-prs
DOMAIN: trade
FILES: 88 files — ALL trade components, ALL services, ALL hooks, shell, scanners, quotes, CSS, .claude/ infrastructure
VALIDATION: tier3
TIER: 3
PR: #19
BRANCH: worker-2/trade-hooks-migration

This is the LARGEST and most complex merge. PR #19 touches 88 files with 16K additions. It migrates trade components from mockData imports to useKalshiData hooks.

PREREQUISITE: ALL other PRs (#17, #18, #13, #15) must be merged first.

STRATEGY — DO NOT BLINDLY REBASE. The PR has massive diffs because the branch diverged early. Many files show as fully rewritten even though actual changes are small. Use this approach:

1. git fetch origin
2. git checkout worker-2/trade-hooks-migration
3. Attempt: git rebase origin/main
4. If conflicts are overwhelming (>20 files), ABORT the rebase and use cherry-pick strategy instead:
   a. git rebase --abort
   b. Create new branch from main: git checkout -b trade-hooks-clean origin/main
   c. Identify the ACTUAL meaningful changes in PR #19 (the hooks migration in trade components)
   d. Apply those changes manually to the clean branch
   e. The key changes are in: src/components/trade/*.jsx (replacing mockData imports with useKalshiData hooks)
   f. Also check: src/components/trade/*.css for any styling changes
   g. Push the clean branch: git push origin trade-hooks-clean
   h. Update PR #19 to point to clean branch OR close #19 and create new PR
5. npm run build — verify build passes
6. Merge via gh pr merge (or new PR if branch was recreated)
7. Verify all trade components use hooks instead of mockData

TRADE COMPONENT HOOKS MIGRATION PATTERN:
OLD: import { subscribeToTicker } from '../../services/mockData'
     useEffect(() => { const unsub = subscribeToTicker(t, cb); return unsub }, [t])
NEW: import { useTickerData } from '../../hooks/useKalshiData'
     const { data, loading, error } = useTickerData(ticker)

COMPONENTS TO MIGRATE (if cherry-picking):
- Accounts.jsx
- EventLog.jsx (already in main from #13)
- Montage.jsx
- Positions.jsx
- PriceLadder.jsx (already in main from #14)
- TradeLog.jsx

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- PR merged (or equivalent clean PR created and merged)
- All trade components use useKalshiData hooks, NOT mockData imports
- Build passes
- No regressions in existing functionality

tasks.subject: Final build verification after all PR merges
tasks.description:
REQUEST_ID: merge-all-open-prs
DOMAIN: integration
FILES: all
VALIDATION: tier3
TIER: 3

After all 5 PRs are merged into main, perform final verification.

STEPS:
1. git checkout main && git pull origin main
2. npm install (in case dependencies changed)
3. npm run build — must pass cleanly
4. Check that all expected window types are registered in WindowManager.jsx:
   - Chart, TimeSale, Montage, PriceLadder, Positions, TradeLog, EventLog, LiveScanner, HistoricalScanner, MarketClock, Accounts
5. Check that trade components use hooks (grep for mockData imports in trade/):
   grep -r 'from.*mockData' src/components/trade/ — should find NONE
6. Check CSS variables defined in src/index.css
7. Report results

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- npm run build passes with zero errors
- All 11 window types registered
- No direct mockData imports in trade components
- CSS variables present and consistent
